episodes.title: Deconstruct Mind Control from Cults
episodes.description:
📚 Author, Drowning in Doctrine: A Counselor Redefining Family After Religious Trauma https://books.by/redefine-family

💫 As a licensed mental health counselor and ex-mormon I know how challenging it is to overcome ingrained harmful beliefs taught in a high demand religion. Deconstruct Harmful Beliefs video explains that we need to first, become aware that our experience was traumatic. There is limited research and/or discussion about the harmful impact of individuals who do not meet the expectations of a high demand religions and the recognition of the LDS church as a cult. Much of the information about cults comes from the information I gathered from reading "Combating Cult Mind Control" and building a language to describe my experiences. 

🧑🏻‍🏫Dr. Steven Hassan, Cult Expert
https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/81bVI3PU-YL._SL1500_.jpg

For many, religion is source of comfort, but this was not my experience. As an ex-mormon I know firsthand how religious trauma negatively impact relationships. Redefine family is my private community to help others navigate life after living in a cult and overcoming trauma in a religious setting. This is a safe place to heal. I'm a counselor who has overcome addiction and mental health issues after leaving the Mormon/LDS faith. As a counselor and ex-mormon I show others how to navigate their faith deconstruction and heal after negative religious experiences.

What you will get in this community for FREE:
🍵 Coffee chats
💻 Monthly Workshops
📚 Book Club Events
✍️ 8 Ways to overcome Religious Trauma module

❤️Love for you to join https://www.skool.com/religious-trauma-recovery/about

***Though I am a licensed mental health counselor, I am not providing counseling/psychotherapy on any social media platforms. This content is for educational and entertainment purposes only.
subjects: The Church Of Jesus Christ Of Latter-Day Saints
